title: O(n²) duplicate detection with nested loops
description: The findDuplicateUsers function uses nested loops (O(n²)) to find duplicates by email. For large user lists this will be very slow. Additionally, the same duplicate may be added multiple times to the result array.
suggestion: Use a Map or Set keyed by email: const seen = new Map<string, User>(); for (const user of users) { if (seen.has(user.email)) duplicates.push(user); else seen.set(user.email, user); } This reduces complexity to O(n).
